response.justification: Bogdan has significant experience with full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and cloud-based solutions, including MCP code generators and agentic workflows. However, his resume does not explicitly mention AI-driven solutions (RAG, vector databases), multi-agent systems, or LLM performance metrics, which are critical for this role. His deep expertise in TypeScript, cloud platforms (AWS), and system design compensates somewhat, but gaps in GenAI-specific experience weigh heavily.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker)
Proven leadership in technical tooling and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows)
Demonstrated ability to design scalable systems and mentor teams across diverse domains
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or GenAI-specific pipelines
Limited evidence of LLM optimization or multi-agent system frameworks (e.g., LangGraph, CrewAI)
Resume lacks clear examples of AI-driven solutions or production-grade GenAI deployments
